void.string: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns2="http://temenos.com/CPBAPI/WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK/Output" xmlns:ns5="http://temenos.com/CPBAPI" xmlns:ns6="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns4="http://temenos.com/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOK" xmlns:ns1="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:EnDe="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Md5UniCode="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Remove="Remove" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:replace="replace" xmlns:replaceStr="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:stringtext="stringtext" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero EnDe MD5Hex Md5UniCode Remove ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion myext replace replaceStr rounding sringindex strings stringtext truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_IN_PORT" select="document('IN_PORT')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <AccountStmtRp> <ErrorCode> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="($document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns5:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse/Status/successIndicator)=('Success')"> <xsl:value-of select="'00'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="'05'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorCode> <ErrorMsg> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns5:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse/Status/successIndicator"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorMsg> <AccountName> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns5:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType/ns4:PRTNM"></xsl:value-of> </AccountName> <AccountNumber> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns5:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType/ns4:DACC"></xsl:value-of> </AccountNumber> <CustomerNumber> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns5:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType/ns4:CUS"></xsl:value-of> </CustomerNumber> <CCY> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns5:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType/ns4:CHKCCY"></xsl:value-of> </CCY> <StartBalance> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns5:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType/ns4:OPENINGBALANCE"></xsl:value-of> </StartBalance> <EndingBalance> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns5:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType/ns4:ClosingBalance"></xsl:value-of> </EndingBalance> <ListTxn> <xsl:for-each select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns5:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType/ns4:gCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKDetailType/ns4:mCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKDetailType"> <TxnDetail> <TxnDate> <xsl:variable name="if1"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="./ns4:BookDate"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if1"></xsl:value-of> </TxnDate> <TxnRef> <xsl:value-of select="./ns4:Reference"></xsl:value-of> </TxnRef> <TxnContent> <xsl:value-of select="./ns4:Description"></xsl:value-of> </TxnContent> <ValueDate> <xsl:variable name="if2"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="./ns4:ValueDate"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if2"></xsl:value-of> </ValueDate> <MoneyOut> <xsl:value-of select="./ns4:Debit"></xsl:value-of> </MoneyOut> <MoneyIn> <xsl:value-of select="./ns4:Credit"></xsl:value-of> </MoneyIn> <Balance> <xsl:value-of select="./ns4:ClosingBalance"></xsl:value-of> </Balance> </TxnDetail> </xsl:for-each> </ListTxn> </AccountStmtRp> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?><!-- Published by JAX-WS RI (http://jax-ws.java.net). RI's version is JAX-WS RI 2.3.2-1 git-revision#dbe58a8. --><xsd:schema xmlns:ns0="http://temenos.com/CPBAPI" xmlns:ns1="http://temenos.com/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOK" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" targetNamespace="http://temenos.com/CPBAPI"><xsd:import schemaLocation="https://utap.cambodiapostbank.com.kh:7002/CPBAPI/services?xsd=2" namespace="http://temenos.com/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOK"/><xsd:complexType name="WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK"><xsd:sequence><xsd:element name="WebRequestCommon" type="ns0:webRequestCommon"/><xsd:element name="CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType" type="ns0:enquiryInput"/></xsd:sequence></xsd:complexType><xsd:complexType name="WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse"><xsd:sequence><xsd:element name="Status" type="ns0:Status" minOccurs="0"/><xsd:element name="CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType" type="ns1:CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/></xsd:sequence></xsd:complexType><xsd:complexType name="WSCPBAPISVLSTMT"><xsd:sequence><xsd:element name="WebRequestCommon" type="ns0:webRequestCommon"/><xsd:element name="CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType" type="ns0:enquiryInput"/></xsd:sequence></xsd:complexType><xsd:complexType name="WSCPBAPISVLSTMTResponse"><xsd:sequence><xsd:element name="Status" type="ns0:Status" minOccurs="0"/><xsd:element name="CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType" type="ns1:CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/></xsd:sequence></xsd:complexType><xsd:complexType name="webRequestCommon"><xsd:sequence><xsd:element name="company" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/><xsd:element name="password" type="xsd:string"/><xsd:element name="userName" type="xsd:string"/></xsd:sequence></xsd:complexType><xsd:complexType name="enquiryInput"><xsd:sequence><xsd:element name="enquiryInputCollection" type="ns0:enquiryInputCollection" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" nillable="true"/></xsd:sequence></xsd:complexType><xsd:complexType name="enquiryInputCollection"><xsd:sequence><xsd:element name="columnName" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/><xsd:element name="criteriaValue" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/><xsd:element name="operand" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/></xsd:sequence></xsd:complexType><xsd:complexType name="Status"><xsd:sequence><xsd:element name="transactionId" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/><xsd:element name="messageId" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/><xsd:element name="successIndicator" type="ns0:successIndicator" minOccurs="0"/><xsd:element name="application" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/><xsd:element name="messages" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" nillable="true"/></xsd:sequence></xsd:complexType><xsd:element name="WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK" type="ns0:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK"/><xsd:element name="WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse" type="ns0:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse"/><xsd:element name="WSCPBAPISVLSTMT" type="ns0:WSCPBAPISVLSTMT"/><xsd:element name="WSCPBAPISVLSTMTResponse" type="ns0:WSCPBAPISVLSTMTResponse"/><xsd:simpleType name="successIndicator"><xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"><xsd:enumeration value="Success"/><xsd:enumeration value="TWSError"/><xsd:enumeration value="T24Error"/><xsd:enumeration value="T24Override"/><xsd:enumeration value="T24Offline"/></xsd:restriction></xsd:simpleType></xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema xmlns:tns="http://temenos.com/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOK" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" elementFormDefault="qualified" xmlns="http://temenos.com/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOK" targetNamespace="http://temenos.com/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOK"> <xsd:complexType name="CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="HDRLINE11" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="HDRLINE21" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="HDRLINE22" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="HDRLINE3" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="DACC" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="CUS" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="SPACE" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="PRTNM" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="CHKCCY" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="BFWD" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="OPENINGBALANCE" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="DBAL" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="ClosingBalance" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="ZERORECORDS" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="gCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKDetailType"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="mCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKDetailType"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="Account" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="BookingDate" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="BookDate" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="Reference" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="Description" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="Narrative" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="ValueDate" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="Debit" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="Credit" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="ClosingBalance" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> <xsd:attribute name="m" type="xsd:positiveInteger" use="optional"/> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> <xsd:attribute name="g" type="xsd:positiveInteger" use="optional"/> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:schema>

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?><!-- Published by JAX-WS RI (http://jax-ws.java.net). RI's version is JAX-WS RI 2.3.2-1 git-revision#dbe58a8. --><xsd:schema xmlns:ns0="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" targetNamespace="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array"><xsd:complexType name="anyTypeArray"><xsd:sequence><xsd:element name="item" type="xsd:anyType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" nillable="true"/></xsd:sequence></xsd:complexType></xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema xmlns:ns1="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array" xmlns:tns="http://temenos.com/CPBAPI" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://temenos.com/CPBAPI" targetNamespace="http://temenos.com/CPBAPI"> <xsd:complexType name="webRequestCommon"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="company" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="password" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="userName" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="enquiryInput"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="enquiryInputCollection" type="tns:enquiryInputCollection"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:simpleType name="successIndicator"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="Success"/> <xsd:enumeration value="TWSError"/> <xsd:enumeration value="T24Error"/> <xsd:enumeration value="T24Override"/> <xsd:enumeration value="T24Offline"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:complexType name="WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="Status" type="tns:Status"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="WebRequestCommon" type="tns:webRequestCommon"/> <xsd:element name="CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType" type="tns:enquiryInput"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="Status"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="transactionId" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="messageId" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="successIndicator" type="tns:successIndicator"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="application" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="messages" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="enquiryInputCollection"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="columnName" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="criteriaValue" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="operand" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="WSCPBAPISVLSTMTResponse"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" name="Status" type="tns:Status"/> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="WSCPBAPISVLSTMT"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="WebRequestCommon" type="tns:webRequestCommon"/> <xsd:element name="CPBAPISTMTENTBOOKType" type="tns:enquiryInput"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:element name="WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse" type="tns:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse"/> <xsd:element name="WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK" type="tns:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK"/> <xsd:element name="WSCPBAPISVLSTMTResponse" type="tns:WSCPBAPISVLSTMTResponse"/> <xsd:element name="WSCPBAPISVLSTMT" type="tns:WSCPBAPISVLSTMT"/> </xsd:schema>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsd:schema xmlns="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:wsp="http://www.w3.org/ns/ws-policy" xmlns:tns="http://temenos.com/CPBAPI" xmlns:wsp1_2="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy" xmlns:wsu="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:wsam="http://www.w3.org/2007/05/addressing/metadata" xmlns:ftns="http://temenos.com/CPBAPI/WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK/Output" targetNamespace="http://temenos.com/CPBAPI/WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOK/Output"> <xsd:import namespace="http://temenos.com/CPBAPI"/> <xsd:import namespace="http://temenos.com/CPBAPISTMTENTBOOK"/> <xsd:import namespace="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array"/> <xsd:element name="Envelope"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element ref="ftns:Header"/> <xsd:element ref="ftns:Body"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Header"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence/> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Body"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element ref="tns:WSCPBAPISTMTENTBOOKResponse"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xsd:element name="AccountStmtRp"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorCode" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorMsg" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountName" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountNumber" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="CustomerNumber" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="CCY" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="StartBalance" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="EndingBalance" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="ListTxn"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="TxnDetail"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="TxnDate" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="TxnRef" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="TxnContent" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ValueDate" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="MoneyOut" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="MoneyIn" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="Balance" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>
